allow:
Bash(manufacturer" or "clothing factory" failed the anchor match because it
   didn''t literally contain "hoodie". Added synonym expansion map so related
   terms \(clothing, apparel, garment, sweatshirt, knitwear, etc.\) count as
   matches.

3. **Retail filter + unrescuable backfill** — suppliers scored <50 with
   any retail indicator \("online shop", "boutique"\) were filtered as
   "retail_store", and the backfill promotion explicitly refused to rescue
   "retail_store" or "wrong_product_type" suppliers. Now:
   - Retail filtering is skipped entirely for consumer products
   - Relevance floor lowered from 35→25 for consumer products
   - Backfill enters "desperate mode" when zero suppliers survive,
     relaxing promotion rules to rescue filtered candidates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
